title: Error ERR-404-NF Handling
body:
Error ERR-404-NF is returned when a requested resource ID does not exist in the product catalog. Triage recommendations:
- Category: 'Catalog'.
- Priority: 'low'.
- Tag: 'data-integrity'.
Suppor agents should verify the resource ID with the customer before escalating to the catalog team.

title: Error ERR-503-Service Unavailable
body:
Error ERR-503 indicates the payment gateway is temporarily unavailable. Apply these settings:
- Category: 'Payments'.
- Priority: 'critical'.
- Tag: 'outage'.

Notify the on-call SRE immediately and post an update to the #incident-response Slack channel.
